---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for Varity SDK, UI Kit, Types, or CLI
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What's frustrating about the current behavior?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Package

Which package does this apply to?

- [ ] `@varity-labs/sdk`
- [ ] `@varity-labs/ui-kit`
- [ ] `@varity-labs/types`
- [ ] `varitykit` CLI
- [ ] SaaS Template
- [ ] Documentation

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or examples.
